DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT FOUNDERS REALTY, INC., a California Corporation DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Michael Bracamontes, Esq. of Bracamontes & Vlasak 835-6777 for pltfs & opposing parties; Joshua N. Rosen, Esq. of Bledsoe, Cathcart, Diestel, Pedersen & Treppa LLP 981-5411 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - OVERRULED. DEFENDANT MUST FILE ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS.
AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, A WRONGFUL ENDEAVOR UNDER THE SFAC DOES NOT REQUIRE SERVICE OF A NOTICE TO QUIT.
AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED THAT DEFENDANT ABUSED ITS POSITION OF POWER AND KNEW OF PLAINTIFF'S VULNERABILITY. WHETHER THE CONDUCT ALLEGED IS SUFFICIENTLY OUTRAGEOUS IS A TRIABLE QUESTION OF FACT.
AS TO THE 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION, ONE INCIDENT CAN CREATE LIABILITY UNDER THE STATUTE. DEFENDANT MISCITES PODOLSKY. THE COURT WILL NOT CONSIDER THE STANDING ISSUE BECAUSE DEFENDANT FIRST RAISES IT IN ITS REPLY.
AS TO THE 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION, DEFENDANT'S NOTICE IS A FACTUAL ISSUE. PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLED THIS CAUSE OF ACTION.
AS TO THE 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY PLEADS FACTS TO MEET THE DEFINITION OF CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION UNDER CUNNINGHAM.
In addition, the Court ruled that the 11th cause of action is overruled, adequately pled. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-18-2011 Continued To Mar-11-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
